findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in `dev.yml`, a dev-scoped overlay. Per the composition, dev = base.yml + observability.yml + dev.yml, while staging/prod = `<env>.yml` + services.yml + observability.yml (dev.yml is not composed). So `widgetizer` reaches dev but is silently absent from staging and prod. It is a real application service (a containerized image consuming the Postgres DB via WIDGETIZER_DB_URL), not local-developer-experience tooling (Traefik/mailcatcher/DB-admin UI), so the dev-only placement is a parity defect.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service to `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery overlay staging/prod compose) or define it in the deployed `<env>.yml` overlays so it reaches staging/prod. If it is intentionally dev-only, record that in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted.
